theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

top_news.title: Saudi Arabian Oil Exports to China Set for Deep Drop in June
top_news.summary: Saudi Arabian crude oil exports to China for loading in June are set to plunge to around 13 million to 14 million barrels, according to traders informed by the producer.

top_news.title: US Unleashes Another Wave of Emergency Oil as Gas Prices Bite
top_news.summary: The US Strategic Petroleum Reserve awarded 53.3 million barrels to companies including oil trader Trafigura Group and US refiner Marathon Petroleum Corp, adding to a wave of oil released to help tame surging prices stemming from the Iran war.

top_news.title: Gen Z Shoppers Driving Traffic Growth at Simon’s Malls, CEO Says
top_news.summary: Mall owner Simon Property Group Inc. is seeing strong interest from Gen Z shoppers and the brands that target them, Chief Executive Officer Eli Simon said on a call with investors.

top_news.title: Sunshine Silver Files for IPO Seeking Funds to Reopen Idaho Mine
top_news.summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. filed for a US initial public offering, and is seeking funds to restart a mine in Idaho that previously produced silver, antimony and other minerals.

top_news.title: Radio Station Owner Spanish Broadcasting Files Bankruptcy
top_news.summary: Radio station owner Spanish Broadcasting System Inc. filed for bankruptcy on Monday after announcing plans to hand ownership to noteholders in exchange for restructuring the debt.

top_news.title: SEC Moves to End ‘Gag Rule’ Criticized by Musk and Cuban
top_news.summary: The White House is reviewing a plan for the Securities and Exchange Commission to end its decades-old policy that lets companies and people settle enforcement actions without admitting wrongdoing if they also promise not to dispute the allegations.

top_news.title: Another Record Setting Day for US Equities | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Market Still Expecting Strait of Hormuz to Reopen: Renaud-Chatelain
top_news.summary: Pictet Wealth Management Senior Fixed Income Strategist Laureline Renaud-Chatelain says short-term inflation rates have not priced in the worse-case scenario of an extended closure of the Strait of Hormuz. She speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie, Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Emerging Currencies Drop as Iran Conflict Dims Risk Appetite
top_news.summary: Emerging-market currencies weakened against the dollar on Monday as oil advanced and tensions in the Middle East escalated, with President Donald Trump and Iran’s leadership rejecting each other’s peace proposals and signaling no end in sight to the 10-week-old war.

top_news.title: UK Fintech Wise Makes US Trading Debut With Dual Listing
top_news.summary: Wise Group Plc made its trading debut in the US with a Nasdaq listing as the financial technology firm tries to take advantage of a larger stock market and its legions of investors.
